name: Applesauce Granola Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together eggs, oil, applesauce, and apple juice concentrate in a bowl.
2. Add flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg; beat well until combined.
3. Mix in the granola thoroughly.
4. Drop batter by spoonfuls onto lightly oiled baking sheets.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 7-10 minutes or until firm to the touch and browned on the bottom.
6. Cool on wire racks.
To make granola, combine equal amounts of any of the following: rolled oats, chopped nuts, flaked coconut, finely chopped dried fruit, sunflower seeds.
